summary: Free subscriber archive game - Feed Select
description:
GIVEN a user is a free subscriber
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3

steps.action: WHEN a user selects an archive game tile
steps.result:
THEN the following title text is displayed "Full Game Access"
AND an [Upgrade Plan] button displays center justified below "Full Game Access"
AND "Recap" and "Condensed Game" buttons displays center justified below the [Upgrade Plan] button
AND the user is navigated to the Subscriptions/Paywall page if they select the "Upgrade MLB.TV" button
AND the user is navigated back to the previous page after pressing the back button on the controller
